commit.author: FlexNetOS <flexnetos@de-flex.net>

lines.content: The Meta platform has been verified for adoption by FlexNetOS Org. The architecture is sound, the build from source is successful, and all core tests pass. A deep planning session has identified several key areas for future growth.

The Meta platform has been verified for adoption and enhanced with Ollama provider support. Workspace repositories have been standardized in .meta.yaml and .gitignore to ensure correct orchestration and build isolation.
- [x] Deep Planning Session completed and documented.
- [x] Add Ollama as a provider in Meta and Rust Rover.
- [x] Properly add meta repos to .meta.yaml for orchestration.
- **Build Quality**: Core meta crates have 100% test pass rate. Adopted repositories (like `shimmy`) have minor regression failures that need separate investigation.

commit.message: Add Ollama provider support and standardize multi-repo workspace
